descriptions: Del Prete-Buonerba and Buonerba are related as subgroups; Buonerba is part of Del Prete-Buonerba.
edges.evidence_quote: Appartenente al clan Del Prete-Buonerba (sottogruppo del clan Mazzarella).

descriptions: Del Prete-Buonerba is a subgroup of Mazzarella.
edges.evidence_quote: Appartenente al clan Del Prete-Buonerba (sottogruppo del clan Mazzarella).

descriptions: AFCA Maluku is a main group within AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: The main groups within the AFCA hooligan firm are: - AFCA Maluku

descriptions: Saoradh is the political wing of New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: It is widely considered that Saoradh is the political wing of the New IRA.

descriptions: Saoradh is a political wing of the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: The RIRA also has political wings: the 32 County Sovereignty Movement (formerly the 32 County Sovereignty Committee), led by Francis Mackey, and unregistered political party Saoradh, led by Brian Kenna.

Bonde dos 40.description: Brazilian criminal organization founded in 2007 in the Pedrinhas Penitentiary Complex in São Luís, Maranhão. It operates in the states of Maranhão, Piauí, and Mato Grosso, engaging in drug trafficking, murders, robberies, and prison rebellions. Originally allied with Primeiro Comando da Capital, it later broke with them and is now a major gang in northeastern Brazil.

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 formed an alliance with Amigos dos Amigos.
edges.evidence_quote: forming alliances with Comando Vermelho (CV) and Amigos dos Amigos (ADA).

descriptions: B40 is allied with ADA.
edges.evidence_quote: O Bonde dos 40 , mais conhecida como B40 , é uma organização criminosa criada em São Luís , aliada à facção carioca ADA .

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco Bahia is listed as an ally of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , TCP , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime RN, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco Bahia, CCA Pará.

descriptions: CCA Pará is listed as an ally of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , TCP , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime RN, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco Bahia, CCA Pará.

descriptions: COM is a dissident faction from B40 and PCM.
edges.evidence_quote: Isto fez surgir outra facção Comando Organizado do Maranhão (COM), uma dissidência das duas facções maranhenses

descriptions: In 2019, Bonde dos 40 entered a war with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: It was also reported that same year that it entered into a war with Comando Vermelho to dominate the Vila Conceição neighborhood in southern São Luís.

descriptions: B40 and CV are rivals for territory in São Luís.
edges.evidence_quote: Desde 2019 , o B40 tem o domínio aproximado de 80% da capital maranhense, enquanto outros 20% são do rival Comando Vermelho

descriptions: CV is listed as a rival of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: PCC , CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 formed an alliance with Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: forming alliances with Comando Vermelho (CV) and Amigos dos Amigos (ADA).

descriptions: GDE is listed as an ally of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , TCP , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime RN, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco Bahia, CCA Pará.

descriptions: Guardiões do Estado is listed as an ally of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , TCP , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime RN, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco Bahia, CCA Pará.

descriptions: Nova Okaida is listed as an ally of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , TCP , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime RN, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco Bahia, CCA Pará.

descriptions: Infobox lists Okaida as an ally of Bonde dos 40.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Amigos dos Amigos , Okaida [ pt ] , Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte [ pt ]

descriptions: After breaking alliance, Bonde dos 40 and PCC are in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Until 2017, it was an ally of the Primeiro Comando da Capital, but they broke with their former allies in Teresina, sparking an intense war.

descriptions: B40 was allied with PCC until 2017, then broke and started a war.
edges.evidence_quote: Até 2017 eram aliados á facção paulista PCC . no entanto, romperam com a facção em Teresina, causando uma guerra intensa que dura até hoje.

descriptions: PCC is listed as a rival of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: PCC , CV

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 was allied with PCC until 2017, then broke and went to war.
edges.evidence_quote: Until 2017, it was an ally of the Primeiro Comando da Capital, but they broke with their former allies in Teresina, sparking an intense war.

descriptions: Bonde dos 40 has been violently battling PCM for control.
edges.evidence_quote: the group became known for instigating riots in prisons and in the Pedrinhas Penitentiary Complex against the Primeiro Comando do Maranhão (PCM), and for carrying out attacks on the streets, resulting in the deaths of over 100 inmates Since then, PCM and B40 have been violently battling for control over stilt neighborhoods and peripheral communities, causing dozens of deaths and injuries.

descriptions: B40 and PCM fought violently for control of neighborhoods.
edges.evidence_quote: Desde então, o PCM e B40 passaram a lutar violentamente pelos domínios nos bairros de palafitas

edges.target: Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte
descriptions: Infobox lists Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte as an ally of Bonde dos 40.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Amigos dos Amigos , Okaida [ pt ] , Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte [ pt ]

edges.target: Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte
descriptions: Sindicato do Crime RN is listed as an ally of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , TCP , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime RN, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco Bahia, CCA Pará.

descriptions: TCP is listed as an ally of B40 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: GDE , TCP , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime RN, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco Bahia, CCA Pará.

descriptions: Infobox lists Bonde dos 40 as a rival of CV.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Bonde dos 40 ...

descriptions: GDE allied with Bonde dos 40 in 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 2017, a facção, que antes era 'neutra', decide se aliar ao Primeiro Comando da Capital e ao Bonde dos 40

descriptions: Bronx Boys are listed as rivals of DLASTHR in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bronx Boys , True Kings

descriptions: Infobox lists Vigilantes MC as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Vigilantes MC

Volksfront.description: American white separatist organization founded in 1994 by Randal Lee Krager and Richard Arden while incarcerated in Oregon. The group aimed to create an all-white homeland in the Pacific Northwest and had chapters in the US and several other countries. It was considered a neo-Nazi skinhead group by watchdogs. The US branch dissolved in 2012.

descriptions: Members of Volksfront were linked to Hammerskins.
edges.evidence_quote: A number of Volksfront's members were linked with the Hammerskins, a white supremacist group formed in Texas

descriptions: Los Cabrera is an armed wing of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the cartel's sub-groups and allies are known to consist of ... Los Cabrera (armed wing)

descriptions: Cherry Hill Gambinos is a Sicilian faction of the Gambino family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sicilian faction of the Gambino family, known as the Cherry Hill Gambinos, is a group of Sicilian mafiosi operating as an arm of the family

descriptions: The Croxteth Crew killed a member of the Norris Green Strand Crew, indicating a violent rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The murder came the day before the first anniversary of the killing of Liam Smith, an alleged member of a rival gang, the Norris Green Strand Crew, who was shot dead by members of the Croxteth Crew on 23 August 2006.

descriptions: The two gangs were engaged in a violent feud with multiple shootings and murders.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2007, the feud between two street gangs from Croxteth and Norris Green reached its peak with the murder of innocent 11 year old Rhys Jones .

descriptions: The Crocky Crew and Strand Gang were engaged in a violent war that led to the death of an innocent child.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 2007, the ongoing war between two rival gangs the ‘Crocky Crew’ and ‘Strand Gang’, caused nationwide outrage when innocent 11-year-old Rhys Jones was shot in the back as he walked home from football practice and died in his mother's arms in the car park of the Fir Tree pub in the Croxteth district of Liverpool.

descriptions: Los Guerreros is listed as an ally of Cártel de Tláhuac in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: CJNG , Fuerza Anti-Unión , La Familia Michoacana , Células delictivas locales y de menor importancia como La Ronda 88 y Los Guerreros

French Connection.description: The French Connection was a heroin smuggling network that operated from the 1930s to the 1970s, trafficking opium from Indochina and Turkey to France for refining, then to the United States and Canada. Based in Marseille, it was run by Corsican gangsters including Antoine Guérini and Paul Carbone. The network supplied the majority of heroin in the U.S. during its peak in the 1960s before being dismantled.

descriptions: François Spirito was a leader of the French Connection, indicating the clan's involvement.
edges.evidence_quote: He was one of the leaders of the French Connection

descriptions: The Clan dei marsigliesi originated from members of the French Connection milieu.
edges.evidence_quote: provenienti in gran parte dal cosiddetto milieu marsigliese , il cartello criminale francese meglio conosciuto come " French Connection "

descriptions: The French Connection used funds stolen by the Carlingue to set up drug labs.
edges.evidence_quote: he used part of the funds stolen by the Carlingue during the war to create drug laboratories near Marseille

descriptions: Carbone and Spirito, leaders of the French Connection, joined the Carlingue during WWII.
edges.evidence_quote: During World War II, Carbone and Spirito joined the Carlingue, which collaborated with the Germans in France; in return, the local civilian authorities in Marseille were expected to ignore their criminal activities.

descriptions: La Gente del Tigre is affiliated with MZ/MF.
edges.evidence_quote: On 31 July 2025, MF/MZ-affiliated "La Gente del Tigre" sicarios patrolled San Juan, Sinaloa, near the letras monument.

descriptions: Northern Order is an affiliated organization of Atomwaffen Division in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: The group also had a presence in Canada via an affiliated organization called Northern Order that included members of the Canadian Armed Forces.

descriptions: Northern Order is affiliated with Order of Nine Angles.
edges.evidence_quote: According to Evan Balgord of the Canadian Anti-Hate Network, they were aware of more O9A members in Canada and their affiliated organization Northern Order.

descriptions: Listed as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Orchard Park Trailblazers , Heath Street Gang, Academy Homes Gang, Villa Victoria Park Gang , Everton Geneva Grizzleys

descriptions: Sangra is listed as a rival of El Monte Flores.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bassett Grande and NS/ES Bolen, Lomas, Sangra, Azusa 13

descriptions: Outlaws planned an attack on Invaders, who disbanded afterward.
edges.evidence_quote: the Outlaws planned to use a 'war wagon'... to attack members of the Invaders at the speedway.

descriptions: Outlaws and Invaders were involved in a gun battle together, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On May 18, 1975, Invaders member Billy J. Schmidt was killed and four others were wounded during a gun battle at the Fugueros clubhouse in Middletown that also involved members of the Outlaws, the Iron Horsemen and the Saints.

descriptions: Sons of Silence had a bar fight and shootings with Invaders.
edges.evidence_quote: Another bar fight involving the Sons of Silence and the Invaders motorcycle gang at a Denver tavern resulted in a series of sporadic shootings.

descriptions: Elmwood st 13 is a main rival of Westside Locos 13.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang's main rivals include the nearby Toonerville Rifa 13 , Elmwood st 13

descriptions: The Santapaola clan and the Cappello-Cintorino clan were jointly running a criminal network involved in drug trafficking and extortion.
edges.evidence_quote: a large-scale anti-mafia operation ... exposed a vast criminal network run by the Cappello-Cintorino and Santapaola clans, deeply entrenched in drug trafficking, extortion, and territorial control

descriptions: Untouchable Bishops were bitter enemies of South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Also bitter enemies of SBB were the Puerto Rican Gangs, The Untouchable Bishops, and the Apaches, and the African American gangs The Mau Maus, and the Chaplains.

descriptions: Hoover Crips severed alliance with Crips after Washington's death.
edges.evidence_quote: The East Coast Crips (from East Los Angeles) and the Hoover Crips directly severed their alliance after Washington's death.

Chechen mafia.description: One of the largest ethnic organized crime groups in the former Soviet Union, based in the North Caucasus and Moscow. Founded in the 1980s by Nikolay Suleimanov, it uses Chechen tribal structures (teip) and the abrek concept. Active in money laundering, racketeering, arms and drug trafficking, and cybercrime, with ties to Chechen separatism. Still active as of the present.

descriptions: The Chechen mafia came into conflict with the Orekhovskaya gang.
edges.evidence_quote: This brought them into conflict with the Slavic gangs, including the Solntsevskaya bratva and the Orekhovskaya gang

descriptions: The Chechen mafia came into conflict with the Solntsevskaya bratva.
edges.evidence_quote: This brought them into conflict with the Slavic gangs, including the Solntsevskaya bratva and the Orekhovskaya gang

descriptions: Orekhovskaya and Solntsevskaya allied against Chechen mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989 the gang merged with the Solntsevskaya bratva to combat the growing threat of Chechen mafia gangs.

descriptions: Chechen mafia is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... Chechen mafia

descriptions: Chechen mafia challenged Solntsevskaya's dominance, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: But by the early 1990s, the Solntsevo's dominance was challenged by the Chechen mafia.

descriptions: A member of the Chechen mafia introduced Tambovskaya Bratva associates to Japanese yakuza.
edges.evidence_quote: Temo Davidov, a member of the Chechen mafia which had caused Manvel to flee the Soviet Union for Stockholm where Kinichi Kamiyasu gave him a job and a Polish passport, introduced the Russian mafia, Petrov, Kuzmin, and Malyshev, to the son of a Japanese yakuza from Kobe-Osaka, Kinichi Kamiyasu.

Market Street Commandos.description: The Market Street Commandos was an outlaw motorcycle club that participated in the 1947 Hollister incident alongside the Boozefighters and Pissed Off Bastards of Bloomington. The club merged with the Hells Angels in 1954 to become their San Francisco chapter.

descriptions: San Francisco Hells Angels charter founded by former Market Street Commandos members.
edges.evidence_quote: The San Francisco ("Frisco") charter was reportedly founded by former members of the Market Street Commandos in 1954.

descriptions: Both clubs participated together in the 1947 Hollister incident.
edges.evidence_quote: The Market Street Commandos was an outlaw motorcycle club that, in 1947, along with the Boozefighters and the Pissed Off Bastards of Bloomington , participated in the highly publicized Hollister incident

descriptions: Market Street Commandos merged with Hells Angels in 1954 to become their San Francisco chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1954 the Market Street Commandos merged with the Hells Angels to become their San Francisco chapter.

descriptions: Both clubs participated together in the 1947 Hollister incident.
edges.evidence_quote: The Market Street Commandos was an outlaw motorcycle club that, in 1947, along with the Boozefighters and the Pissed Off Bastards of Bloomington , participated in the highly publicized Hollister incident

descriptions: POBOB and Market Street Commandos jointly participated in the 1947 Hollister riot.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pissed Off Bastards of Bloomington (POBOB) is a motorcycle club that, in 1947, along with the Boozefighters and the Market Street Commandos , participated in the highly publicized Hollister riot

Black Flag Army.description: The Black Flag Army was a splinter remnant of bandit and mercenary groups recruited from ethnic Zhuang and former Taiping soldiers, founded in the 1860s by Liu Yongfu. Based in northern Vietnam, they fought against French colonial forces and other bandits. The army was officially disbanded in 1885 but remnants continued guerrilla warfare.

descriptions: The Black Flag Army fought against the White Flag Army.
edges.evidence_quote: During this period, the Black Flag Army also successfully fought other groups of bandits and mercenaries, such as the White Flag Army and Yellow Flag Army.

descriptions: The Yellow Flag Army was used by the Anamese as a check against the Black Flag Army, indicating rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The Anamese subsidized the Yellow Flags partly to act as a check upon the troublesome Black Flags

F-side.description: Dutch football hooligan group associated with AFC Ajax, founded in 1976 in Amsterdam. Known for violent clashes with rival hooligan groups, particularly the Battle of Beverwijk in 1997. Engages in hooliganism, riots, arson, and drug trafficking. Still active, with a presence in the Amsterdam Arena.

descriptions: F-side is a predecessor group to AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: In the past the Ajax fans consists only out of one firm: the well known F-side.

descriptions: F-side lists Brussel Casual Service as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brussel Casual Service

descriptions: F-side clashes with Bunnikside.
edges.evidence_quote: The F-side also has many clashes with the ... Bunnikside of FC Utrecht.

descriptions: F-side lists Bunnikside as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bunnikside

descriptions: F-side lists Gate 13 as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gate 13

descriptions: F-side lists Lighttown Madness as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Lighttown Madness

descriptions: F-side lists Maccabi Fanatics as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Maccabi Fanatics

descriptions: F-side lists Midden Noord as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Midden Noord

descriptions: F-side lists Opravcy Ultras as allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Opravcy Ultras

descriptions: F-side lists S.C.F. Hooligans as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: S.C.F. Hooligans

descriptions: F-side and VAK410 share territory and are both Ajax hooligan groups.
edges.evidence_quote: VAK410 and the F-side dominate a large area on the south side of the stadium.

descriptions: ATE was an anti-ETA group.
edges.evidence_quote: Anti-ETA groups: ATE (Anti-Terrorismo ETA)

descriptions: Crazy Pistons Motorcycle Club protected Bonanno members during a confrontation.
edges.evidence_quote: he and his brother Dino, also present, were protected by a multitude of bikers from the Crazy Pistons Motorcycle Club in Brooklyn, who, along with the Cammaranos, got into a confrontation with the other mobsters.
